headline: Honeywell Is Said to Near Sale of Warehouse Services Unit to AIP
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Honeywell International Inc. is in advanced discussions to sell its warehouse and workflow solutions business to American Industrial Partners, according to people familiar with the matter.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitTrump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff RefundsUkraine’s Richest Man Bought Monaco Flat for Record $550 MillionTrump Extend
